pattern: A single left-to-right scan that compares each position to a cheap per-element digit-sum returns the first matching index.
hints: For each position you only need the sum of the decimal digits of the value sitting there.
Compare that digit sum to the index itself and stop at the first position where they match.
Iterate i from 0; compute the digit sum of nums[i]; if it equals i return i. Return -1 if the loop ends.

edge_inputs.description: first qualifying index wins over a later one
single element with digit sum zero at index zero
value with multi-digit sum at a deeper index
match at index zero only when digit sum is zero

stress.description: random arrays over the full value range so matches appear unpredictably
